notes: Generator that scaffolds an Astro Starlight docs site into any target repo, faithful to .reference/canon.md. DECISIONS: deliverable = canonical tool authored in THIS repo (skills/ or commands/), registered in tools.manifest.json, emitted to all 5 agent targets via bun run build, like docs-helper (CON-02). Invoked by an engineer through their coding agent; interview is conversational (CON-03). MVP = EVERYTHING in canon at P0 (all 7 areas: detect+interview, core site, 3 content modes, diagrams, 3 deploy targets GH Pages/Vercel/static+Netlify, drift guard, idempotent re-run). Re-run = never-clobber, manifest-driven merge, preserve hand-edited pages (REQ-RERUN-02). Success bar = emitted build MUST go green as smoke test (REQ-VERIFY-01). Unsupported repo = degrade gracefully w/ flagged assumptions, hard-fail only when impossible (REQ-DETECT-02). Single manifest feeds sidebar+symlinker+drift check = strong default w/ documented escape hatch (REQ-CONTENT-03, OQ-2). Versions = ALWAYS LATEST Astro/Starlight at scaffold time (REQ-REL-02, trade-off in OQ-1). Safety = writes only within target repo, symlinks confined to repo, no external transmission (REQ-SEC-01..03). DEPENDENCY: diagram capability delegates to a SEPARATE sibling tool, the `diagram-generator` skill (text-to-diagram, authored in this repo) per REQ-DIAG-02 / CON-05; its invocation contract per REQ-DIAG-03. SEQUENCING (v2): diagram-generator is a HARD PREREQUISITE implemented BEFORE doc-site-plugin; diagram component builds against the RELEASED diagram-generator contract; build smoke test (REQ-VERIFY-01) exercises real diagram generation end-to-end (REQ-DIAG-03). OQ-4 now RESOLVED (contract is a shipped artifact, see diagram-generator spec). OUT OF SCOPE: non-Astro/Starlight generators, authoring docs content, deploying/hosting, ongoing maintenance/auto-upgrade. NEXT: create PRD for diagram-generator sibling feature.
